tools.name: search_skills
tools.description: Full-text (BM25) search over the skills directory. Returns ranked matches with slug, title, description, categories and price.

tools.name: get_skill
tools.description: Return the full SKILL.md content for a skill by slug. Free skills return content; premium skills return a purchase URL unless a valid access code is supplied.

tools.name: list_skills
tools.description: Browse the catalog, optionally filtered by category. Paginated.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all skill categories with counts (the filter vocabulary for list_skills).

tools.name: list_sets
tools.description: List curated skill sets (bundles) with their skill slugs.

tools.name: get_set
tools.description: Return a skill set with full details for each contained skill.

tools.name: recommend_skill
tools.description: Given a natural-language task, return the top 3 matching skills with the exact install command.
